description: The Durco Mark 3 ISO chemical process pump provides outstanding hydraulic performance, unrivaled reliability and low total cost of ownership. Conforming to ISO 2858 and ISO 5199 design criteria, the Durco Mark 3 ISO pump incorporates many proven reliability and performance-enhancing features.
differentiators: Renewable, high-efficiency performance over the life of the pump with the reverse vane impeller
Optimal, predictable seal chamber pressure that is re-established after every impeller setting
SealSentry™ seal chamber for maximal mechanical seal life

description: AHLSTAR A end-suction single-stage centrifugal process pumps are used for demanding industrial applications to ensure process reliability, high efficiency and low operating costs.
differentiators: Versatile selection of reliable, high efficiency Sulzer EnerSave impellers
Patented externally adjusted side plate for continuous high efficiency
Proven Sulzer WaterLess shaft seal for dynamic sealing

description: The standard design features of Goulds 3196 (ANSI B73.1M) pumps meet ASME/ANSI standards. Accommodates Process Industry Practices (PIP) Compliance.
differentiators: Centerline mounted casing available for high temperature services
TaperBore Plus™ and Big Bore™ seal chambers maintain cool and clean seal environments
i-FRAME® Power ends featuring heavy duty, large capacity oil sump with finned tube oil cooler

specifications.power_end: i-FRAME® with finned tube oil cooler
